inclusions: Private Transport: Air-conditioned private vehicles (MPV for 1-3 guests, Minibus for 4-11 guests) with a dedicated driver. This includes fuel, tolls, and parking fees.
Tour Guides: Experienced English-speaking guides. For 1-3 guests, a driver-guide. For 4+ guests, a separate local guide will be provided at each main destination (Bromo, Ijen, Madakaripura).
Mineral Water: Daily supply.
JVTO Travel T-Shirt: One complimentary JVTO branded T-shirt per person on every confirmed booking. Available in sizes XXS–XXL. Groups of 10+ pax receive a custom-designed group T-shirt.
Full Assistance: From your arrival to your final drop-off.
Quality Hotel Accommodation: including daily breakfast.
All Entrance Fees & Permits: to attractions
Meals: As mention in the itinerary
Private 4WD Jeep: For the Mount Bromo sunrise tour.
Health Screening: Ijen authorities require a doctor's health certificate. This will be conducted the evening before your trek. You only need your passport.
Gas Mask: Professional volcanic-grade gas mask provided for Ijen Crater routes. Mandatory during descent to crater floor due to H₂S/SO₂ gas.
Ferry Tickets: From Ketapang Harbour to Gilimanuk Harbour, Bali.
exclusions: International/Domestic Air Tickets: To and from your tour's starting and ending points.
Indonesian VISA: (If applicable).
Travel Insurance: Optional but highly recommended for peace of mind, covering trip interruptions, medical emergencies, and lost luggage.
Meals Not Stated in Itinerary: Specific lunches and additional dinners are at your own expense.
Personal Expenses: Such as snacks, souvenirs, beverages, laundry, etc. It is recommended to carry at least IDR 500,000 per person for these.
Tips: For drivers and guides (at your discretion).

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya to the Bromo Side for Overnight Staging
itineraryDays.summary: The route begins with a transfer from Surabaya to the Bromo side so the sunrise sequence can be handled properly the next morning. This first day is about stable positioning rather than sightseeing overload.

activities.name: Surabaya to Bromo Pickup
activities.description: Pickup at your location in Surabaya. Meet our team at the confirmed pick-up point, complete a quick departure check, and begin the transfer toward the Mount Bromo area (Cemoro Lawang).

activities.name: Lunch at Local Restaurant
activities.description: Stop at a local restaurant for lunch (cost not included). This is the planned lunch break during the transfer day, allowing time to order and dine before continuing to the Bromo area.

activities.name: Check-in Bromo Hotel
activities.description: Arrive at the Mount Bromo area and complete hotel check-in. This step covers arrival at your accommodation in the Bromo area and settling in for the next part of the program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise, Madakaripura, and Transfer Toward Ijen
itineraryDays.summary: After the Bromo sunrise sequence, the route continues through Madakaripura before transferring east toward the Ijen side. This is one of the heaviest connection days in the itinerary and works best when guests expect real movement across East Java.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled early-morning Jeep-based Bromo sunrise program, following the Mount Bromo touring sequence within the allocated time block.

activities.name: Breakfast at Hotel
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return from the Bromo program to the hotel and take the planned breakfast break, allowing time to rest briefly before check-out and the next destination transfer.

activities.name: Check-out and Transfer to Madakaripura
activities.description: Check-out, travel to Madakaripura Waterfall. Complete the hotel check-out process in the Bromo area, then begin the road transfer to Madakaripura Waterfall to start the canyon waterfall segment of the day.

activities.name: Madakaripura Trekking
activities.description: Arrive at Madakaripura and start trekking. Arrive at the Madakaripura area and begin the scheduled trekking session, using the full activity block for the on-site waterfall exploration as planned.

activities.name: Finish explore Madakaripura waterfall
activities.description: Finish explore Madakaripura waterfall. Conclude the trekking and on-site exploration segment at Madakaripura, regroup at the designated meeting point, and prepare for departure to the next transfer leg.

activities.name: Transfer to Bondowoso
activities.description: Start the long journey to Bondowoso (about 3 hours). Depart from the Madakaripura area and begin the overland transfer to Bondowoso (Ijen area), using the scheduled travel window for the afternoon relocation.

activities.name: Check-in at Bondowoso Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso, check-in hotel. Reach Bondowoso and complete the hotel check-in process after the long day, ensuring you are settled before the evening prerequisite procedures.

activities.name: Health screening for Ijen
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel directly at your hotel. This is a brief vital-signs check scheduled as a prerequisite before the Ijen climbing program.

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation
activities.description: Dinner is served at the accommodation (included). End the day with the included dinner at the accommodation, allowing time to rest after the early start, trekking, and long-distance travel.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Forward Finish into Bali
itineraryDays.summary: The final day completes the Ijen segment before the route continues across Ketapang and onward into Bali. It is a strong fit for travelers who want the East Java sequence to end with a clean forward handoff instead of a Surabaya return.

activities.name: Short break after the hike
activities.description: Short break after Ijen Hike. Use this short recovery window in the Ijen area to rest briefly after the hike, reorganize personal items, and prepare for the onward transfer to the harbor.

activities.name: Transfer to Ketapang
activities.description: Start the journey to Ketapang Harbor. Depart from the Ijen area and begin the road transfer to Ketapang Harbor to connect with the ferry crossing to Bali.

activities.name: Ferry to Gilimanuk Harbor
activities.description: Arrive at Ketapang Port and board the ferry. Proceed through the port arrival and boarding flow to begin the ferry crossing toward Gilimanuk Harbor in Bali.

activities.name: Arrival at Bali
activities.description: Arrive at Gilimanuk Harbor, Bali (+1 hour time zone). Disembark at Gilimanuk and adjust to the time zone difference, completing the crossing segment upon arrival in Bali.

highlightsBullets: Iconic sunrise and crater hike at Bromo
Sacred Madakaripura canyon waterfall
Mesmerizing blue fire phenomenon at Ijen
Seamless Java to Bali via ferry
uniqueSellingPoints: Iconic sunrise and crater hike at Bromo
Mesmerizing blue fire phenomenon at Ijen

product.operationalComplexityNote: Bromo sunrise timing, waterfall terrain, Bondowoso transfer, and Ijen screening make this a compact but high-coordination route with a Bali finish.

inclusions: Experienced driver
Kingkong Hill access
Vintage Jeep experience

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya to Bondowoso for Ijen Staging
itineraryDays.summary: The route begins with a transfer from Surabaya to the Bondowoso side so the Ijen segment can be handled properly. After hotel check-in, the required screening is completed before the climb window begins.

activities.name: Surabaya to Bondowoso Transfer
activities.description: Pickup by our team at your location in Surabaya. After meeting at the confirmed pick-up point, begin the overland transfer toward Bondowoso (Ijen area) as scheduled in the route plan.

activities.name: Lunch at Local Restaurant
activities.description: Stop at a local restaurant for lunch (cost not included). This is the planned meal break during the transfer, allowing time to order food and rest briefly before continuing to Bondowoso.

activities.name: Check-in Bondowoso Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso and complete the hotel check-in process. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and the basic check-in procedure so you can settle in after the transfer.

activities.name: Ijen health screening
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel directly at your hotel. This is a scheduled screening session as listed in the itinerary to complete the required check before the Ijen-area program.

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation
activities.description: Dinner is served at the accommodation or a nearby restaurant (included). This is the planned dinner time after the transfer and screening, scheduled as an included meal for the day.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Transfer Toward the Bromo Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Ijen sequence, the route moves west toward the Bromo side. This day is the operational bridge of the package and works best when guests understand it as a serious transfer day, not a light scenic drive.

activities.name: Ijen Tour Experience
activities.description: Follow the entire Ijen tour series. This block represents the full scheduled Ijen program as arranged for the day, completed in sequence before the onward transfer to the Bromo area later.

activities.name: Ijen Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out from the Ijen area hotel. This is the formal check-out step after finishing the Ijen tour series, preparing for lunch and the transfer toward the Bromo area.

activities.name: Lunch at Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant (included). This is the planned meal break after hotel check-out, allowing time to sit down, eat, and reset before the overland drive to Bromo.

activities.name: Journey to Bromo
activities.description: Start the journey to the Bromo area (about 3-4 hours). This is the main overland transfer segment from the Ijen-area base (Bondowoso City) to the Bromo area accommodation zone.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Bromo area, check-in hotel. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and completing check-in so you can rest and prepare for the next day’s Bromo program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise, Madakaripura, and Return to Surabaya
itineraryDays.summary: The final day combines the Bromo sunrise sequence with the Madakaripura stop before the route returns to Surabaya. It is productive and high-contrast, but still depends on disciplined timing across the full day.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled Mount Bromo sunrise tour sequence by Jeep, completing the morning program within the allocated time block.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return to the Bromo hotel after the morning Jeep tour and take a short breakfast break before the mid-day transition.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out, travel to Madakaripura. Complete hotel check-out and begin the transfer toward Madakaripura Waterfall to continue the day’s itinerary sequence.

activities.name: Madakaripura Trekking
activities.description: Arrive at Madakaripura and start trekking. This is the main on-site activity window at Madakaripura Waterfall, dedicated to the trek segment as listed in the schedule.

activities.name: Lunch After Trek (Own Expense)
activities.description: After trekking, have lunch (fees not included). This is the planned meal break after the Madakaripura trekking segment, with dining costs handled personally.

activities.name: Transfer to Surabaya
activities.description: Journey to Surabaya. Begin the return transfer from the Madakaripura area to Surabaya, closing the day tour route.

activities.name: Arrival in Surabaya
activities.description: Arrived in Surabaya. Complete arrival procedures and proceed to the final drop-off point as applicable.

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya to Bondowoso for Ijen Staging
itineraryDays.summary: The first day positions the route on the Bondowoso side so the Ijen climb can be handled properly the next morning. Screening is completed after hotel check-in.

activities.name: Surabaya to Bondowoso Transfer
activities.description: Pickup by our team at your location in Surabaya. After meeting at the confirmed pick-up point, begin the overland transfer toward Bondowoso (Ijen area) as scheduled in the route plan.

activities.name: Lunch at Local Restaurant
activities.description: Stop at a local restaurant for lunch (cost not included). This is the planned meal break during the transfer, allowing time to order food and rest briefly before continuing to Bondowoso.

activities.name: Check-in Bondowoso Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso and complete the hotel check-in process. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and the basic check-in procedure so you can settle in after the transfer.

activities.name: Ijen health screening
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel directly at your hotel. This is a scheduled screening session as listed in the itinerary to complete the required check before the Ijen-area program.

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation
activities.description: Dinner is served at the accommodation or a nearby restaurant (included). This is the planned dinner time after the transfer and screening, scheduled as an included meal for the day.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Transfer Toward the Bromo Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Ijen sequence, the route continues west toward the Bromo side. This remains one of the heavier operational days, but the wider itinerary gives more room around it.

activities.name: Ijen Tour Experience
activities.description: Follow the entire Ijen tour series. This block represents the full scheduled Ijen program as arranged for the day, completed in sequence before the onward transfer to the Bromo area later.

activities.name: Ijen Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out from the Ijen area hotel. This is the formal check-out step after finishing the Ijen tour series, preparing for lunch and the transfer toward the Bromo area.

activities.name: Lunch at Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant (included). This is the planned meal break after hotel check-out, allowing time to sit down, eat, and reset before the overland drive to Bromo.

activities.name: Journey to Bromo
activities.description: Start the journey to the Bromo area (about 3-4 hours). This is the main overland transfer segment from the Ijen-area base (Bondowoso City) to the Bromo area accommodation zone.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Bromo area, check-in hotel. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and completing check-in so you can rest and prepare for the next day’s Bromo program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise, Madakaripura, and Return to Surabaya City
itineraryDays.summary: The main route sequence finishes with Bromo and Madakaripura before returning to Surabaya for the final overnight. This structure reduces departure-day pressure compared with the tighter 3-day loop.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled Mount Bromo sunrise tour sequence by Jeep, completing the morning program within the allocated time block.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return to the Bromo hotel after the morning Jeep tour and take a short breakfast break before the mid-day transition.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out, travel to Madakaripura. Complete hotel check-out and begin the transfer toward Madakaripura Waterfall to continue the day’s itinerary sequence.

activities.name: Madakaripura Trekking
activities.description: Arrive at Madakaripura and start trekking. This is the main on-site activity window at Madakaripura Waterfall, dedicated to the trek segment as listed in the schedule.

activities.name: Lunch After Trek (Own Expense)
activities.description: After trekking, have lunch (fees not included). This is the planned meal break after the Madakaripura trekking segment, with dining costs handled personally.

activities.name: Transfer to Surabaya
activities.description: Journey to Surabaya. Begin the return transfer from the Madakaripura area to Surabaya, closing the day tour route.

activities.name: Arrival in Surabaya
activities.description: Arrived in Surabaya. Complete arrival procedures and proceed to the final drop-off point as applicable.

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya Hotel Stay and Airport Transfer
itineraryDays.summary: The last day is reserved for a calmer Surabaya finish and airport handoff. This makes the route especially useful for guests who want the flagship East Java sequence without racing directly into a same-day departure after the mountain segment.

activities.name: Breakfast and Free Time
activities.description: Breakfast at the hotel and free time until check-out time. This block is reserved for your morning meal and unstructured time at the hotel before the scheduled airport transfer.

activities.name: Transfer to Juanda Airport
activities.description: Pick up at your hotel lobby (planned 3 hours before your flight departure time) and transfer to Juanda Airport. This segment covers the direct road transfer to the airport for your departure connection.

Comfortable city stay in Surabaya on final night

activities.name: Surabaya to Bondowoso Transfer
activities.description: Pickup by our team at your location in Surabaya. After meeting at the confirmed pick-up point, begin the overland transfer toward Bondowoso (Ijen area) as scheduled in the route plan.

activities.name: Lunch at Local Restaurant
activities.description: Stop at a local restaurant for lunch (cost not included). This is the planned meal break during the transfer, allowing time to order food and rest briefly before continuing to Bondowoso.

activities.name: Check-in Bondowoso Hotel

activities.name: Ijen health screening

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Continue to the Papuma Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Ijen sequence, the route moves south toward the Papuma side. This day establishes the broader East Java contrast that makes the package more than a volcano-only itinerary.

activities.name: Ijen Tour
activities.description: Take the Ijen tour. This block represents completing the scheduled Ijen program for the day, finished in full before the onward travel sequence to Jember and Papuma Beach.

activities.name: Ijen Hotel Check-out

activities.name: Lunch at Restaurant
activities.description: Lunch at a local restaurant (included). This is the planned meal stop after check-out, providing time to eat before the transfer toward Jember.

activities.name: Journey to Jember
activities.description: Journey to Jember. This segment is the overland transfer from the Ijen-area base (Bondowoso City) to Jember as scheduled for the day’s long itinerary.

activities.name: Jember Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Jember, check-in, then head straight to Papuma Beach. This step covers arriving at the Jember hotel, completing check-in efficiently, and continuing onward to the beach for the late-afternoon program.

activities.name: Papuma Sunset Experience
activities.description: Enjoying the sunset. This is the dedicated time window at Papuma Beach to relax, take photos, and experience the late-day atmosphere during sunset hour.

activities.name: Return to Jember Hotel
activities.description: Back to the hotel in Jember. This is the return transfer segment after the sunset stop, concluding the day’s coastal visit upon arrival back at the Jember accommodation.

itineraryDays.title: Papuma Area to Tumpak Sewu Staging
itineraryDays.summary: The third day keeps the route moving across East Java toward the Tumpak Sewu side. It should be understood as overland progression rather than as a light rest day between major stops.

activities.name: Check out from hotel
activities.description: Check out hotel. Complete the standard hotel check-out process in Jember, confirm departure readiness, and prepare for the early transfer toward the early Tumpak Sewu (Lumajang) area.

activities.name: Journey to Tumpak Sewu
activities.description: Transfer to Tumpak Sewu waterfall. Depart from the hotel in Jember and begin the direct overland drive to the Tumpak Sewu area, using the allocated travel window for the point-to-point transfer.

activities.name: Explore Tumpak Sewu Waterfall
activities.description: Arrive at the Tumpak Sewu area (Lumajang), and explore Tumpak Sewu Waterfall. Use this activity block for the on-site waterfall experience in the Tumpak Sewu area, following the planned visit duration for exploration and viewing as scheduled.

itineraryDays.title: Tumpak Sewu, Bromo Sequence, and Return to Surabaya
itineraryDays.summary: The final day combines the Tumpak Sewu segment with the Bromo-side finish before returning to Surabaya. It is a productive closing day that works best for travelers who accept a compact but serious route rhythm.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the sunrise tour sequence by Jeep in the Mount Bromo area, following the planned route flow for the morning program.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return from the Bromo morning program to the hotel and take a short breakfast break before check-out and departure.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out from the hotel. Complete the hotel check-out process and prepare for the overland transfer to Surabaya.

activities.name: Transfer to Surabaya
activities.description: Journey to Surabaya. Start the road transfer from the Bromo area to Surabaya as scheduled, concluding the Bromo segment for the day.

activities.name: Finish at Surabaya City
activities.description: Arrive in Surabaya and proceed with the final transfer to your requested drop-off (hotel/airport). Tour ends after drop-off completion.

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya to the Tumpak Sewu Side
itineraryDays.summary: The route opens by moving south from Surabaya toward the Tumpak Sewu side. This first day is about stable positioning for the waterfall segment and the broader eastbound journey ahead.

activities.name: Pickup and Transfer to Tumpak Sewu
activities.description: Pickup at your location in Surabaya and begin the transfer to the Tumpak Sewu area (Lumajang). This segment is the overland journey from the city to the waterfall area accommodation zone.

activities.name: Check-in at Tumpak Sewu Homestay
activities.description: Arrive at the Tumpak Sewu area and check in at the homestay/cottage. This is the scheduled arrival and check-in process so you can settle at the accommodation near the Tumpak Sewu area.

itineraryDays.title: Tumpak Sewu and Continue Toward the Bromo Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Tumpak Sewu segment, the route continues toward the Bromo side for overnight staging. This day introduces the route's terrain-heavy character before the mountain sequence begins.

activities.name: Tumpak Sewu Trekking
activities.description: Starting the Tumpak Sewu trekking. Begin the scheduled trekking session at Tumpak Sewu Waterfall, following the planned route on-site to experience the waterfall area during the allocated activity block.

activities.name: Lunch
activities.description: Lunch at a local restaurant (included). Take the planned lunch break after the trekking session, with time to sit down and eat before the long afternoon transfer.

activities.name: Transfer to Mount Bromo Area
activities.description: Starting the journey to the Mount Bromo area. Depart from the Tumpak Sewu area and begin the overland transfer to the Mount Bromo accommodation zone as scheduled.

activities.name: Check-in at Bromo Hotel
activities.description: Arrive at Bromo area and check-in hotel. Reach the Bromo area and complete hotel check-in, concluding the day’s relocation and preparing for the next morning’s Bromo program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise and Transfer to the Ijen Side
itineraryDays.summary: The third day completes the Bromo sunrise sequence before the route continues east toward the Ijen side. This remains one of the key transfer days and works best when treated as part of the full route logic.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled early-morning Jeep-based Bromo program, following the sunrise tour sequence in the Mount Bromo area within the allocated time window.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return from the morning Bromo program to the hotel and take a proper breakfast break before the mid-day check-out and onward transfer.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out hotel. Complete the hotel check-out process and prepare luggage and departure logistics for the overland journey to Bondowoso (Ijen area).

activities.name: Transfer to Bondowoso
activities.description: Travel to Bondowoso (about 3-4 hours). Start the overland transfer from the Bromo area to Bondowoso, transitioning from the volcanic highlands toward the Ijen-area base town as scheduled.

activities.name: Lunch Break (Own Expense)
activities.description: Stop for lunch on the way (cost not included). Take a short meal break during the transfer, allowing time to order food and rest briefly before continuing to Bondowoso.

activities.name: Bondowoso Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso, check-in hotel. Reach the Bondowoso accommodation and complete the check-in procedure so you can settle in after the transfer day.

activities.name: Ijen health screening
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel directly at your hotel. This is a quick vital-signs check scheduled as a prerequisite before the Ijen climbing program.

activities.name: Included Dinner at Hotel
activities.description: Dinner is served at the accommodation (included). Conclude the day with the planned dinner at the hotel, allowing time to rest and recover after an early start and long transfer.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Finish into Bali
itineraryDays.summary: The final day completes the Ijen segment before the route continues through Ketapang and onward into Bali. It is a strong fit for travelers who want the journey to end with a clear cross-island handoff instead of a Surabaya return.

activities.name: Short break after the hike
activities.description: Short break after Ijen Hike. Use this short recovery window in the Ijen area to rest briefly after the hike, reorganize personal items, and prepare for the onward transfer to the harbor.

activities.name: Transfer to Ketapang
activities.description: Start the journey to Ketapang Harbor. Depart from the Ijen area and begin the road transfer to Ketapang Harbor to connect with the ferry crossing to Bali.

activities.name: Ferry to Gilimanuk Harbor
activities.description: Arrive at Ketapang Port and board the ferry. Proceed through the port arrival and boarding flow to begin the ferry crossing toward Gilimanuk Harbor in Bali.

activities.name: Arrival at Bali
activities.description: Arrive at Gilimanuk Harbor, Bali (+1 hour time zone). Disembark at Gilimanuk and adjust to the time zone difference, completing the crossing segment upon arrival in Bali.

highlightsBullets: Tumpak Sewu magnificent multi-tiered waterfall
Bromo iconic sunrise across volcanic sand sea
Ijen rare blue fire phenomenon and turquoise crater lake
One-way adventure Surabaya to Bali
uniqueSellingPoints: Bromo iconic sunrise across volcanic sand sea
Ijen rare blue fire phenomenon and turquoise crater lake

product.operationalComplexityNote: Waterfall footing, Bromo sunrise timing, Ijen screening, and the Bali handoff make this a demanding but very coherent one-way East Java route.

inclusions: Experienced driver
Kingkong Hill access
Vintage Jeep experience

activities.name: Surabaya to Bondowoso Transfer
activities.description: Pickup by our team at your location in Surabaya. After meeting at the confirmed pick-up point, begin the overland transfer toward Bondowoso (Ijen area) as scheduled in the route plan.

activities.name: Lunch at Local Restaurant

activities.name: Check-in Bondowoso Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso and complete the hotel check-in process. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and the basic check-in procedure so you can settle in after the transfer.

activities.name: Ijen health screening

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Transfer Toward the Bromo Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Ijen sequence, the route continues west toward the Bromo side. This remains one of the heavier transfer days in the itinerary and works best when treated as part of the route logic, not as downtime.

activities.name: Ijen Tour Experience
activities.description: Follow the entire Ijen tour series. This block represents the full scheduled Ijen program as arranged for the day, completed in sequence before the onward transfer to the Bromo area later.

activities.name: Ijen Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out from the Ijen area hotel. This is the formal check-out step after finishing the Ijen tour series, preparing for lunch and the transfer toward the Bromo area.

activities.name: Lunch at Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant (included). This is the planned meal break after hotel check-out, allowing time to sit down, eat, and reset before the overland drive to Bromo.

activities.name: Journey to Bromo
activities.description: Start the journey to the Bromo area (about 3-4 hours). This is the main overland transfer segment from the Ijen-area base (Bondowoso City) to the Bromo area accommodation zone.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Bromo area, check-in hotel. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and completing check-in so you can rest and prepare for the next day’s Bromo program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise, Madakaripura, and Continue to Malang
itineraryDays.summary: The route completes the Bromo sunrise sequence and Madakaripura before continuing to Malang. This day combines strong East Java contrast while still giving the itinerary a more comfortable city finish afterward.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled early-morning Jeep-based Bromo sunrise program, completing the Mount Bromo touring block within the allocated time window before continuing to the next destination.

activities.name: Breakfast at Hotel
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return from the Bromo program to the hotel and take the planned breakfast break, allowing time to refresh before check-out and transfer to Madakaripura.

activities.name: Check-out and Transfer to Madakaripura
activities.description: Check-out, travel to Madakaripura Waterfall. Complete hotel check-out in the Bromo area and begin the transfer to Madakaripura Waterfall, moving to the canyon-waterfall segment of the day.

activities.name: Madakaripura Trekking
activities.description: Arrive at Madakaripura and start trekking. Arrive at the Madakaripura area and begin the scheduled trekking session, using the allocated time for on-site exploration of the waterfall area as planned.

activities.name: Finish explore Madakaripura waterfall
activities.description: Finish explore Madakaripura waterfall. Conclude the trekking and exploration segment at Madakaripura, regroup at the meeting point, and transition to the next transfer leg according to schedule.

activities.name: Transfer to Malang
activities.description: Start the journey to Malang (about 3-4 hours). Depart from the Madakaripura area and begin the overland transfer to Malang, using the planned travel time for the afternoon relocation.

activities.name: Check-in at Malang Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Malang, check-in hotel. Reach Malang and complete hotel check-in, concluding the day’s program upon arrival at the accommodation.

itineraryDays.title: Malang and Batu Exploration with Return Toward Surabaya
itineraryDays.summary: The fourth day shifts away from strict mountain rhythm and gives room for Malang and Batu-based exploration before returning toward Surabaya. It works best for guests who value a softer closing segment after the core route is complete.

activities.name: Check-out Malang Hotel
activities.description: Check-out from Malang hotel. Complete check-out procedures and prepare for departure to begin the day tour route before the return to Surabaya.

activities.name: Malang to Batu Tour Start
activities.description: Starting the tour to the Batu area. Begin the transfer from Malang toward Batu City, starting the day’s touring sequence in the Batu area within the allocated time block.

activities.name: Lunch in Batu
activities.description: Lunch in Batu (cost not included). Take the planned lunch break in Batu, with time to dine and rest before departing toward Surabaya later in the day.

activities.name: Batu to Surabaya Transfer
activities.description: Transfer to Surabaya City. Depart Batu and start the overland transfer to Surabaya, shifting from the Batu area touring segment to the final return leg.

activities.name: Arrival in Surabaya
activities.description: Arrive in Surabaya, transfer to hotel/airport. Complete arrival in Surabaya and proceed with the final drop-off to the requested hotel or airport location. Tour ends after drop-off.

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya Hotel Finish and Airport Transfer
itineraryDays.summary: The final day is reserved for a calmer Surabaya finish and airport handoff. This structure helps the route end cleanly without forcing a same-day rush immediately after the major volcano sequence.

activities.name: Breakfast and Free Time
activities.description: Breakfast at the hotel and free time until check-out time. This block is reserved for your morning meal and unstructured time at the hotel before the scheduled airport transfer.

activities.name: Transfer to Juanda Airport
activities.description: Pick up at your hotel lobby (planned 3 hours before your flight departure time) and transfer to Juanda Airport. This segment covers the direct road transfer to the airport for your departure connection.

itineraryDays.title: Bali to Banyuwangi for Ijen Staging
itineraryDays.summary: The route starts in Bali and crosses into East Java before positioning on the Ijen side. After hotel check-in, the required screening is completed before the climb window begins.

activities.name: Bali Hotel Pick-up to Gilimanuk
activities.description: Pick up at your hotel in Bali and depart for Gilimanuk Harbor. This is the overland transfer segment across Bali toward the ferry port to continue the journey to Banyuwangi.

activities.name: Ferry Crossing to Ketapang
activities.description: Arrive at Gilimanuk Harbor and proceed with the ferry boarding process. This step covers arrival at the harbor and completing the necessary boarding flow to cross to Ketapang Port.

activities.name: Transfer to hotel in Banyuwangi
activities.description: Arrive at Ketapang Port, Banyuwangi, and note the time zone change of -1 hour. This is the arrival point on the Java side; adjust your timing reference accordingly before continuing the transfer to the hotel.

activities.name: Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Check-in at the Banyuwangi hotel. This step covers arrival at your accommodation and completing the standard check-in process so you can settle in after the crossing.

activities.name: Ijen Health Screening
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel at a local clinic. This is a quick procedure to check vital signs as a prerequisite for climbing Ijen, completed as a short scheduled stop before the evening program.

activities.name: Dinner
activities.description: Dinner at the hotel or a nearby restaurant (own expense). This is the planned dinner window in Banyuwangi city after check-in and the health screening, with dining costs handled personally.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Transfer Toward the Bromo Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Ijen sequence, the route continues west toward the Bromo side. This day works best when guests understand it as a real connection day rather than as a light transition.

activities.name: Ijen Tour Experience
activities.description: Follow the entire Ijen tour series. This block represents the full scheduled Ijen program as arranged for the day, completed in sequence before the onward transfer to the Bromo area later.

activities.name: Ijen Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out from the Ijen area hotel. This is the formal check-out step after finishing the Ijen tour series, preparing for lunch and the transfer toward the Bromo area.

activities.name: Lunch at Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant (included). This is the planned meal break after hotel check-out, allowing time to sit down, eat, and reset before the overland drive to Bromo.

activities.name: Journey to Bromo
activities.description: Start the journey to the Bromo area (about 3-4 hours). This is the main overland transfer segment from the Ijen-area base (Bondowoso City) to the Bromo area accommodation zone.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Bromo area, check-in hotel. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and completing check-in so you can rest and prepare for the next day’s Bromo program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise, Madakaripura, and Finish in Surabaya
itineraryDays.summary: The final day combines the Bromo sunrise sequence with Madakaripura before the route finishes in Surabaya. It is a strong fit for travelers who want a forward East Java finish instead of returning to Bali.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled Mount Bromo sunrise tour sequence by Jeep, completing the morning program within the allocated time block.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return to the Bromo hotel after the morning Jeep tour and take a short breakfast break before the mid-day transition.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out, travel to Madakaripura. Complete hotel check-out and begin the transfer toward Madakaripura Waterfall to continue the day’s itinerary sequence.

activities.name: Madakaripura Trekking
activities.description: Arrive at Madakaripura and start trekking. This is the main on-site activity window at Madakaripura Waterfall, dedicated to the trek segment as listed in the schedule.

activities.name: Lunch After Trek (Own Expense)
activities.description: After trekking, have lunch (fees not included). This is the planned meal break after the Madakaripura trekking segment, with dining costs handled personally.

activities.name: Transfer to Surabaya
activities.description: Journey to Surabaya. Begin the return transfer from the Madakaripura area to Surabaya, closing the day tour route.

activities.name: Arrival in Surabaya
activities.description: Arrived in Surabaya. Complete arrival procedures and proceed to the final drop-off point as applicable.

itineraryDays.title: Midnight Departure from Surabaya for Bromo Sunrise

activities.name: Surabaya to Bromo Pickup
activities.description: Pickup at your location in Surabaya. Our team meets you at the agreed pick-up point, confirms the booking details, and begins the overnight overland drive toward the Bromo transit point to start the midnight tour flow.

activities.name: Start Bromo Sunrise Tour
activities.description: Arrive at the Bromo transit point and transition to a private 4WD Jeep. After switching vehicles, the Bromo sunrise program starts, continuing by Jeep into the Bromo area according to the sunrise touring sequence.

activities.name: Bromo Sunrise Viewing
activities.description: Witness the sunrise from the viewpoint area. This is the dedicated time window for sunrise viewing, taking photos, and enjoying the changing light across the landscape from the designated Bromo viewpoint.

activities.name: Explore Sea of Sand and Bromo Crater

activities.location: Sea of Sand and Bromo Crater

activities.name: Return to Transit Point
activities.description: After completing the Bromo activity sequence, return from the Bromo area to the transit point. This is the regrouping and transfer-back step before the breakfast stop and the return drive.

activities.name: Simple Breakfast
activities.description: Enjoy a simple breakfast at a local restaurant (included). This is a short, practical meal break after the Bromo morning route, with time to sit down and recharge before departing back to Surabaya.

activities.name: Bromo to Surabaya Return
activities.description: Start the journey back to Surabaya. This is the main return transfer segment by road after finishing the Bromo sunrise route and breakfast stop.

activities.name: Arrival in Surabaya
activities.description: Estimated arrival back in Surabaya. Upon arrival, proceed with the final transfer to your requested drop-off point (hotel/airport/station). Tour ends after the drop-off is completed.

itineraryDays.title: Surabaya to Bondowoso for Ijen Staging

activities.name: Surabaya to Bondowoso Transfer
activities.description: Pickup by our team at your location in Surabaya. After meeting at the confirmed pick-up point, begin the overland transfer toward Bondowoso (Ijen area) as scheduled in the route plan.

activities.name: Lunch at Local Restaurant
activities.description: Stop at a local restaurant for lunch (cost not included). This is the planned meal break during the transfer, allowing time to order food and rest briefly before continuing to Bondowoso.

activities.name: Check-in Bondowoso Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso and complete the hotel check-in process. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and the basic check-in procedure so you can settle in after the transfer.

activities.name: Ijen health screening
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel directly at your hotel. This is a scheduled screening session as listed in the itinerary to complete the required check before the Ijen-area program.

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation
activities.description: Dinner is served at the accommodation or a nearby restaurant (included). This is the planned dinner time after the transfer and screening, scheduled as an included meal for the day.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Continue to the Papuma Side
itineraryDays.summary: After the Ijen sequence, the route continues south toward the Papuma side. This day establishes the wider East Java contrast that defines the route as an overland journey rather than a short volcano pair.

activities.name: Ijen Tour
activities.description: Take the Ijen tour. This block represents completing the scheduled Ijen program for the day, finished in full before the onward travel sequence to Jember and Papuma Beach.

activities.name: Ijen Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check out hotels in the Ijen area. This is the departure step from the Ijen-area accommodation after completing the Ijen tour block, transitioning to lunch and onward travel.

activities.name: Lunch at Restaurant
activities.description: Lunch at a local restaurant (included). This is the planned meal stop after check-out, providing time to eat before the transfer toward Jember.

activities.name: Journey to Jember
activities.description: Journey to Jember. This segment is the overland transfer from the Ijen-area base (Bondowoso City) to Jember as scheduled for the day’s long itinerary.

activities.name: Jember Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Jember, check-in, then head straight to Papuma Beach. This step covers arriving at the Jember hotel, completing check-in efficiently, and continuing onward to the beach for the late-afternoon program.

activities.name: Papuma Sunset Experience
activities.description: Enjoying the sunset. This is the dedicated time window at Papuma Beach to relax, take photos, and experience the late-day atmosphere during sunset hour.

activities.name: Return to Jember Hotel
activities.description: Back to the hotel in Jember. This is the return transfer segment after the sunset stop, concluding the day’s coastal visit upon arrival back at the Jember accommodation.

itineraryDays.title: Papuma Area to Tumpak Sewu Staging
itineraryDays.summary: The third day keeps the route moving toward the Tumpak Sewu side. It works best when guests understand it as purposeful overland progression rather than as idle transfer time.

activities.name: Check out from hotel
activities.description: Check out hotel. Complete the standard hotel check-out process in Jember, confirm departure readiness, and prepare for the early transfer toward the early Tumpak Sewu (Lumajang) area.

activities.name: Journey to Tumpak Sewu
activities.description: Transfer to Tumpak Sewu waterfall. Depart from the hotel in Jember and begin the direct overland drive to the Tumpak Sewu area, using the allocated travel window for the point-to-point transfer.

activities.name: Explore Tumpak Sewu Waterfall
activities.description: Arrive at the Tumpak Sewu area (Lumajang), and explore Tumpak Sewu Waterfall. Use this activity block for the on-site waterfall experience in the Tumpak Sewu area, following the planned visit duration for exploration and viewing as scheduled.

itineraryDays.title: Tumpak Sewu and Transfer Toward the Bromo Side
itineraryDays.summary: The waterfall segment changes the route rhythm before the journey continues toward the Bromo side. It should be treated as real terrain, not simply as a scenic add-on before the final mountain phase.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the early-morning Jeep-based Bromo sunrise program, completing the Mount Bromo touring block as scheduled before continuing onward later in the day.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return to the Bromo hotel after the morning program for breakfast and a short rest before check-out and departure to Malang.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Check-out hotel. Complete the hotel check-out and prepare for the transfer from the Bromo area to the Malang area.

activities.name: Transfer to Malang
activities.description: Travel to Malang (about 2-3 hours). Begin the road transfer from the Bromo area to Malang, transitioning from the volcano region to the city accommodation area.

activities.name: Malang Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Malang, check-in hotel. Reach Malang and complete the hotel check-in process, concluding the day’s relocation after the Bromo sunrise program.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise and Continue to Malang
itineraryDays.summary: The fifth day completes the Bromo sequence before the route continues to Malang. This creates a softer closing phase and gives the itinerary more room after the main mountain segment.

activities.name: Hotel Breakfast
activities.description: Breakfast at your hotel. Start the day with breakfast at the accommodation, allowing time to prepare for the scheduled city tour departure.

activities.name: Malang Hotel Pick-up
activities.description: Pick up at your hotel in Malang. Meet at the hotel pick-up point, confirm the day’s route flow, and begin the city tour sequence from Malang.

activities.name: Visit Jodipan Colorful Village
activities.description: Visiting Jodipan Colorful Village. Arrive at the village area and spend the allotted time walking through the colorful neighborhood setting, focusing on the scheduled visit and photo opportunities during this stop.

activities.name: Explore San Terra De Laponte
activities.description: Exploring San Terra De Laponte. Use this visit block to explore the attraction area as scheduled, following the on-site flow for sightseeing and taking photos within the allocated time window.

activities.name: Lunch in Batu
activities.description: Lunch in Batu (cost not included). Take the planned meal break in Batu, with time allocated to choose food and rest briefly before continuing the afternoon stops.

activities.name: Photo Session at Taman Langit
activities.description: Take photos at Taman Langit & Goa Pinus. This segment is dedicated to visiting both photo-focused spots as listed, using the scheduled duration to explore viewpoints and complete the planned photo session.

activities.name: Visit Apple Picking Agrotourism
activities.description: Visiting Apple Picking Agrotourism. Use this stop to experience the apple-picking agrotourism visit as scheduled, including time for the on-site activity flow within the allotted duration.

activities.name: Return to Malang Hotel
activities.description: Back to the hotel in Malang. Conclude the city tour route and return by road to the hotel, completing the day’s program upon arrival back at the accommodation.

itineraryDays.title: Malang and Surabaya Departure Handoff
itineraryDays.summary: The final day is reserved for the last Malang-based segment and a clean transfer toward Surabaya for the airport handoff. It suits travelers who want a long East Java route to end in a controlled and readable way.

activities.name: Breakfast and Free Time
activities.description: Breakfast at the hotel and free time until check-out time. This block is reserved for your morning meal and unstructured time at the hotel before the scheduled airport transfer.

activities.name: Transfer to Juanda Airport
activities.description: Pick up at your hotel lobby (planned 3 hours before your flight departure time) and transfer to Juanda Airport. This segment covers the direct road transfer to the airport for your departure connection.

itineraryDays.title: Bali to the Bromo Side via East Java Crossing
itineraryDays.summary: The route begins in Bali and crosses into East Java before moving onward to the Bromo side. This first day is about clean cross-island positioning so the volcano sequence can start properly the next morning.

activities.name: Bali Morning Pick-up to Gilimanuk
activities.description: Morning pick up at your hotel in Bali. Meet at the confirmed lobby pick-up point and begin the overland transfer toward Gilimanuk Harbor to connect with the ferry crossing.

activities.name: Ferry Crossing to Ketapang
activities.description: Arrive at Gilimanuk Harbor and board the ferry. This step covers port arrival and completing the boarding flow to begin the sea crossing to Ketapang Port.

activities.name: Long Journey to Bromo
activities.description: Arrive at Ketapang Port, Banyuwangi and continue the long overland transfer to the Bromo area. This is the extended road journey segment connecting the ferry arrival point to the Bromo accommodation area.

activities.name: Lunch Break (Own Expense)
activities.description: Lunch (at your own expense) along the way. This is a short, practical meal stop during the drive, with time allocated to order food and take a brief rest before continuing the transfer.

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Estimated arrival in the Bromo area. Check in to your hotel and rest immediately. This step covers arrival at the accommodation and completing check-in so you can settle in after a full day of travel.

itineraryDays.title: Bromo Sunrise, Madakaripura, and Transfer to Bondowoso
itineraryDays.summary: After the Bromo sunrise sequence, the route continues through Madakaripura before transferring toward Bondowoso. The day stays productive, but it should be understood as one of the heavier connection days in the itinerary.

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour
activities.description: Starting the Bromo Jeep tour. Begin the scheduled early-morning Jeep-based Bromo sunrise program, following the Mount Bromo touring sequence within the allocated time block.

activities.name: Breakfast at Hotel
activities.description: Back to the hotel for breakfast. Return from the Bromo program to the hotel and take the planned breakfast break, allowing time to rest briefly before check-out and the next destination transfer.

activities.name: Check-out and Transfer to Madakaripura
activities.description: Check-out, travel to Madakaripura Waterfall. Complete the hotel check-out process in the Bromo area, then begin the road transfer to Madakaripura Waterfall to start the canyon waterfall segment of the day.

activities.name: Madakaripura Trekking
activities.description: Arrive at Madakaripura and start trekking. Arrive at the Madakaripura area and begin the scheduled trekking session, using the full activity block for the on-site waterfall exploration as planned.

activities.name: Finish explore Madakaripura waterfall
activities.description: Finish explore Madakaripura waterfall. Conclude the trekking and on-site exploration segment at Madakaripura, regroup at the designated meeting point, and prepare for departure to the next transfer leg.

activities.name: Transfer to Bondowoso
activities.description: Start the long journey to Bondowoso (about 3 hours). Depart from the Madakaripura area and begin the overland transfer to Bondowoso (Ijen area), using the scheduled travel window for the afternoon relocation.

activities.name: Check-in at Bondowoso Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Bondowoso, check-in hotel. Reach Bondowoso and complete the hotel check-in process after the long day, ensuring you are settled before the evening prerequisite procedures.

activities.name: Health screening for Ijen
activities.description: A health screening will be conducted by medical personnel directly at your hotel. This is a brief vital-signs check scheduled as a prerequisite before the Ijen climbing program.

activities.name: Dinner at Accommodation
activities.description: Dinner is served at the accommodation (included). End the day with the included dinner at the accommodation, allowing time to rest after the early start, trekking, and long-distance travel.

itineraryDays.title: Ijen Climb and Return to Bali
itineraryDays.summary: The final day completes the Ijen segment before the route crosses back toward Bali. This return works best for guests who actively value the round-trip Bali finish and accept the rhythm needed to make it work cleanly.

activities.name: Short break after the hike
activities.description: Short break after Ijen Hike. Use this short recovery window in the Ijen area to rest briefly after the hike, reorganize personal items, and prepare for the onward transfer to the harbor.

activities.name: Transfer to Ketapang
activities.description: Start the journey to Ketapang Harbor. Depart from the Ijen area and begin the road transfer to Ketapang Harbor to connect with the ferry crossing to Bali.

activities.name: Ferry to Gilimanuk Harbor
activities.description: Arrive at Ketapang Port and board the ferry. Proceed through the port arrival and boarding flow to begin the ferry crossing toward Gilimanuk Harbor in Bali.

activities.name: Arrival at Bali
activities.description: Arrive at Gilimanuk Harbor, Bali (+1 hour time zone). Disembark at Gilimanuk and adjust to the time zone difference, completing the crossing segment upon arrival in Bali.

highlightsBullets: Two-volcano private route from Bali with guided cross-island handling
Bromo sunrise and Ijen crater kept central without stretching into a longer expedition
Best for Bali-based travelers who want both signature volcanoes in one route
Round-trip Bali finish with private handling across ferry and overland segments
marketing.safetyPositioning: sterilized gas masks, health screening for Ijen, experienced Jeep drivers, sulfur exposure protocols, strong safety track record with professional guides and strict protocols
uniqueSellingPoints: Two legendary volcanoes in one compact itinerary

product.operationalComplexityNote: Cross-island transfers, two early starts, and Ijen screening make this a high-coordination route despite its short duration.

inclusions: Experienced driver
Kingkong Hill access
Vintage Jeep experience

JVTO Travel T-Shirt: One complimentary JVTO branded T-shirt per person on every confirmed booking. Available in sizes XXS–XXL. Groups of 10+ pax receive a custom-designed group T-shirt.
Full Assistance: From your arrival to your final drop-off.
Quality Hotel Accommodation: including daily breakfast.
All Entrance Fees & Permits: to attractions
Meals: As mention in the itinerary
Private 4WD Jeep: For the Mount Bromo sunrise tour.
Gas Mask: Professional volcanic-grade gas mask provided for Ijen Crater routes. Mandatory during descent to crater floor due to H₂S/SO₂ gas.
exclusions: International/Domestic Air Tickets: To and from your tour's starting and ending points.
Indonesian VISA: (If applicable).
Travel Insurance: Optional but highly recommended for peace of mind, covering trip interruptions, medical emergencies, and lost luggage.
Meals Not Stated in Itinerary: Specific lunches and additional dinners are at your own expense.
Personal Expenses: Such as snacks, souvenirs, beverages, laundry, etc. It is recommended to carry at least IDR 500,000 per person for these.
Tips: For drivers and guides (at your discretion).

activities.description: Enjoy breakfast at the accommodation (included). This is the scheduled morning meal time before departure, allowing you to start the day with breakfast at your accommodation.

activities.name: Pick up and Transfer to Prigen Safari

activities.name: Safari Adventure at Prigen
activities.description: Arrive at Prigen Safari Park and start the Safari Adventure. This is the main safari visit window, allocated for entering the park and following the planned safari activities during your time on-site.

activities.name: Lunch at Safari Area

activities.name: Transfer to Bromo Area

activities.name: Check-in at Bromo Hotel

activities.name: Bromo Jeep Tour Experience

activities.name: Bromo Hotel Check-out
